data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Optimized route planning (minimize drive time)', but the evidence does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions route optimization, it lacks concrete evidence of how the system minimizes drive time or validates this functionality. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the optimization of route planning to minimize drive time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for route optimization
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the route optimization functionality.
